response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required. They also have experience with AI agent development and various other technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Lack of direct experience with Nest.js
Limited experience with Kotlin/Java in recent roles
Geographical location in Lagos, Nigeria, may pose logistical challenges
